task_completion.description: Create the forensic case 'Custodian_Tracking_2024' in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Autopsy application window should be open, with 'Custodian_Tracking_2024' visible in the title bar, case dashboard, or tree view. The case number 'INV-CUS-009' may also be visible in the case details.

task_completion.description: Add ntfs_undel.dd and assign it to Person 'Alice_Chen' and Host 'Alice_USB'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autopsy Data Sources tree or Persons/Hosts view, 'Alice_Chen' should be visible as a Person, 'Alice_USB' as a Host, and 'ntfs_undel.dd' listed as the associated data source.

task_completion.description: Add jpeg_search.dd and assign it to Person 'Bob_Smith' and Host 'Bob_Camera'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autopsy Data Sources tree or Persons/Hosts view, 'Bob_Smith' should be visible as a Person, 'Bob_Camera' as a Host, and 'jpeg_search.dd' listed as the associated data source.

task_completion.description: Generate a CSV manifest mapping custodians to hosts and data sources.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, spreadsheet tool, or terminal window showing the contents of 'custodian_manifest.csv' located in '/home/ga/Reports/'. The file must contain the header 'PERSON,HOST,DATA_SOURCE' and the corresponding rows for Alice and Bob.

task_completion.description: Write a narrative summary explaining the logical segregation of evidence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the contents of 'custodian_summary.txt' located in '/home/ga/Reports/'. The file must contain a brief narrative text explaining the evidence segregation.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to create the case and add data sources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Autopsy graphical user interface being interacted with (e.g., 'New Case' wizard, 'Add Data Source' wizard), rather than the agent just running SQLite commands in a terminal to modify autopsy.db.

integrity.description: The CSV and TXT reports were genuinely created and saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths '/home/ga/Reports/custodian_manifest.csv' and '/home/ga/Reports/custodian_summary.txt' should be visible in the title bar of a text editor, a file manager, or via terminal commands like 'cat' or 'ls'.

integrity.description: The agent did not hallucinate the data sources or paths.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen selecting the actual files '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' and '/home/ga/evidence/jpeg_search.dd' in the Autopsy file selection dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Custodian_Tracking_2024. Case Number: INV-CUS-009. Data Source 1: ntfs_undel.dd assigned to Person: Alice_Chen, Host: Alice_USB. Data Source 2: jpeg_search.dd assigned to Person: Bob_Smith, Host: Bob_Camera. Manifest file: /home/ga/Reports/custodian_manifest.csv with exact header 'PERSON,HOST,DATA_SOURCE'. Summary file: /home/ga/Reports/custodian_summary.txt.
